## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (`main` branch — backend or frontend)
- [ ] - [ ] New observability integration (`example/<tool>` branch)
- [ ] - [ ] Documentation / README update
- [ ] - [ ] Chore / tooling (CI, templates, configs)
- [ ] - [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

- [ ] ## Checklist

- [ ] ### For all PRs
- [ ] - [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] - [ ] Commit message follows the `type: description` convention
- [ ] - [ ] No unrelated changes included

- [ ] ### For `example/*` integration branches
- [ ] - [ ] Branched from current `main` (not from another `example/*` branch)
- [ ] - [ ] Exactly **one commit** on top of `main` — the diff shows only integration code
- [ ] - [ ] Tracing is opt-in: if the required env var is missing, `init_*()` is a no-op
- [ ] - [ ] README.md comparison table updated on `main`

- [ ] ### For bug fixes
- [ ] - [ ] Steps to reproduce are documented (or linked to the issue)
- [ ] - [ ] Tests added or updated where applicable

- [ ] ## Related Issue

- [ ] Closes #<!-- issue number -->

- [ ] ## Testing Done
